ADMTG_PRVDR_ID 
LABEL: 
Admitting Provider Identification Number 
DESCRIPTION: The state-assigned provider identifier for the doctor responsible for admitting a patient to a hospital 
or other inpatient health facility. 
SHORT NAME: ADMTG_PRVDR_ID 
LONG NAME: ADMTG_PRVDR_ID 
TYPE: 
CHAR

30 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims
